stats.label: About Us

stats.description: LeftFlow is an AI automation agency specializing in chatbot development, voice assistants, RAG-powered assistants, LLM development, AI consulting, and end-to-end AI solutions.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Answers to frequently asked AI questions

items.question: What is LeftFlow?
items.answer: LeftFlow is an AI automation agency offering content generation, AI agents, workflow automation, and LLM development services. Our goal is to save you time and boost efficiency.

items.question: What problems can your AI solutions solve?
items.answer: We provide solutions across customer service automation, data analysis, content generation, business process optimization, and many more areas.

items.question: Is LeftFlow suitable for businesses of all sizes?
items.answer: Absolutely! We offer customized AI solutions for businesses of every size, from startups to enterprise organizations.

items.question: Why are RAG or LLM development valuable?
items.answer: RAG and LLM technologies transform your company data into intelligent assistants, improving customer experience and increasing operational efficiency.

items.question: How much does LeftFlow cost?
items.answer: We customize every project to fit your needs. During our free discovery call, we'll recommend a solution that works within your budget.
